```{r}
so_orig@meta.data %>% filter(IGT %in% c("IGT7", "IGT8", "IGT8"), annotation_level1 == "CD4") %>% count(annotation_level2, organ_simplified)

FindAllMarkers(so_orig[,], ident.1 = "CD4.G", ident.2 = "CD4.Q", group.by = "annotation_level3", test.use = "wilcox", logfc.threshold = 0.1, min.pct = 0.1)

```



**Heatmap with DGE between 2 tip clusters**

```{r}
ttlist1 = readRDS('/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/DGE_limma/20260318_tips/ttlist_tips.Rds')
ttlist1 = ttlist1[8:10]

tmp = ttlist1

names(tmp) 
gene_sig = list()

cols = c("darkorchid", "violetred2", "burlywood2" )
names(cols) = names(tmp)

pdf(sprintf("%s/Volcano_DGE_ClustersWithingEachTip.pdf", out_dir), 15, 15, useDingbats = F)
for (i in names(tmp)) {
    print(i)
    vplot = na.omit(data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^tmp[[i]]$logFC, pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value + 10^-80, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))) #dealing with NA
    # vplot = data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^tmp[[i]]$logFC, pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value+10^-300, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))
    p = Vplot(vplot = vplot, xlab = names(tmp)[i], xlimits = c(min(vplot$fc[vplot$fc != 0]), max(vplot$fc)), ylimits = c(min(vplot$pval), 1),size = 2, color = cols[i])  #c(min(vplot$pval[vplot$pval != 0]),1)
    sub = vplot %>%
        filter(abs(log2(fc)) > 0.1 & pval < 10^-5) %>%
        arrange(desc(log2(fc))) %>%
        pull(SYMBOL)
    sub
    # gene_sig[[sprintf("%s_up", i)]] = sub
    highlight_genes = sub #unique(c(head(sub, 25), tail(sub, 25)))
    # sub = (log2(vplot$fc) > 0.5 | log2(vplot$fc) < -0.5)  & vplot$pval < 0.05
    # sub = vplot[sub,] %>% arrange(desc(log2(fc)))
    # sub1 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(25) #vplot$SYMBOL %in% as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:200]
    # sub2 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(25)
    highlight_filter = vplot$SYMBOL %in% highlight_genes
    # sub = vplot$SYMBOL %in% c(sub1, sub2)#as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:50]
    library(ggrepel)
    # print(p)
    print(p + geom_text_repel(data = vplot[highlight_filter,], aes(x = fc, y = pval, label = SYMBOL)) + ggtitle(i) + xlab(sprintf("FC %s", i)))
}
dev.off()

comp_filt = names(tmp)

genes_to_label <- c()
for (i in comp_filt) {
    df <- tmp[[i]] #%>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)
    # top up
    up_genes <- df %>% filter(logFC > 0.1,  P.Value < 10^-5) %>% 
        arrange(desc(logFC)) %>%
        pull(SYMBOL) 
    # top down
    down_genes <- df %>% filter(logFC < -0.1,  P.Value < 10^-5) %>% 
        arrange(logFC) %>%
        pull(SYMBOL)
    # remove genes already selected
    # up_genes <- setdiff(up_genes, genes_to_label)
    # down_genes <- setdiff(down_genes, genes_to_label)
    
    # add top 20 each
    genes_to_label <- c(
        genes_to_label,
        head(up_genes, 10), head(down_genes, 10)
        # head(up_genes, 100), head(down_genes, 100)
    )
}

genes_to_label <- genes_to_label[
    !grepl(
        "^Gm|^mt-|^Tpl|^Rps|^Snor|^Mir|^Linc|^Rp[sl]|-ps|Rik$|^Hbb",
        genes_to_label,
        ignore.case = TRUE
    )
]

genes_to_label = unique(genes_to_label )

#plot heatmap
# mat_coef <- sapply(tmp, function(tmp) tmp$logFC)
lapply(tmp, function(x) all(x$SYMBOL == tmp[[1]]$SYMBOL)) ##check that rownames match!!!

common_genes <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(tmp, function(x) x$SYMBOL))
tmp <- lapply(tmp, function(x) {
  x %>%
    dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% common_genes) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(match(SYMBOL, common_genes))
})
lapply(tmp, function(x) identical(x$SYMBOL, tmp[[1]]$SYMBOL))

mat_coef <- Reduce(cbind, lapply(tmp, function(x) x[,"logFC"]))
rownames(mat_coef) = tmp[[1]]$SYMBOL
colnames(mat_coef) = make.names(names(tmp))
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
range(mat_plot)

# tmp[["R_vs_S"]][genes_to_label,1]
# mat_coef[genes_to_label,"R_vs_S"]

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
    c(-3, 0, 3),
    c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)

pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_DGE_ClustersWithingEachTipTop10genes.pdf", out_dir), width = 5, 5, useDingbats = F)
# pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_Th17Clusters_Top10Genes.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 6, useDingbats = F)
Heatmap(
    mat_plot,
    name = "log2FC",
    col = col_fun,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
    column_title = "Top 10 genes between clusters in each tip"
)
dev.off()

```

```{r}
ttlist1 = readRDS('/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/DGE_limma/20260318_tips/ttlist_tips.Rds')
tmp = ttlist1[8:10]
names(tmp)
lapply(tmp, function(x) all(x$SYMBOL == tmp[[1]]$SYMBOL)) ##check that rownames match!!!
# common_genes <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(tmp, function(x) x$SYMBOL))
# tmp <- lapply(tmp, function(x) {
#   x %>%
#     dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% common_genes) %>%
#     dplyr::arrange(match(SYMBOL, common_genes))
# })
# lapply(tmp, function(x) identical(x$SYMBOL, tmp[[1]]$SYMBOL))

vplot = data.frame(fc1 = 2^tmp$R_vs_S$logFC, fc2 = 2^(-tmp$T_vs_U$logFC), SYMBOL = tmp$R_vs_S$SYMBOL)
genes_to_label = c(tmp$R_vs_S %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(20),
                   tmp$R_vs_S %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(20),
                   tmp$T_vs_U %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(20),
                   tmp$T_vs_U %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(20)) %>% unique()
FCFCplot(vplot = vplot, genes_to_label =  genes_to_label, xlimits = c(1/5,5), ylimits = c(1/5,5) )

vplot = data.frame(fc1 = 2^tmp$R_vs_S$logFC, fc2 = 2^(-tmp$X_vs_Y$logFC), SYMBOL = tmp$R_vs_S$SYMBOL)
genes_to_label = c(tmp$R_vs_S %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(20),
                   tmp$R_vs_S %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(20),
                   tmp$X_vs_Y %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(20),
                   tmp$X_vs_Y %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(20)) %>% unique()
FCFCplot(vplot = vplot, genes_to_label =  genes_to_label, xlimits = c(1/5,5), ylimits = c(1/5,5) )
vplot = data.frame(fc1 = 2^tmp$R_vs_S$logFC, fc2 = 2^(-tmp$X_vs_Y$logFC), SYMBOL = tmp$R_vs_S$SYMBOL)
FCFCplot(vplot = vplot, xlimits = c(1/5,5), ylimits = c(1/5,5) )

vplot = data.frame(fc1 = 2^tmp$T_vs_U$logFC, fc2 = 2^(tmp$X_vs_Y$logFC), SYMBOL = tmp$R_vs_S$SYMBOL)
FCFCplot(vplot = vplot )
```




**Figure 3 - CD4 GP analysis**
```{r}
mdata_orig = so@meta.data

#option 1 (best): import F1 and L1 from the fit object: 
L1 = readRDS(sprintf('/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/L1.Rds')) #cells x factor
F1 = readRDS(sprintf("/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/F1.Rds")) #gene x factor

mdata_orig %>% select(IGT, exp_name) %>% unique()

mdata_orig %>% count(organ_simplified)

#c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I")

group_list = list(
#1    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.RS vs CD4.TUXYHI"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.TU vs CD4.RSXYHI"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.X", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.H", "CD4.I")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.XY vs CD4.RSTUHI"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.H", "CD4.I")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.HI vs CD4.RSTUXY"),
#2    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.RS vs CD4.TUXY"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.TU vs CD4.RSXY"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.X", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.XY vs CD4.RSTU"),
#3    
        list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.S")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c( "CD4.U", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.S vs CD4.UY"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.U")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.S", "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.U vs CD4.SY"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c( "CD4.Y")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.S", "CD4.U")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.Y vs CD4.SU"),
#4    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.RS vs CD4.TUXYHI in gut"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.TU vs CD4.RSXYHI in gut"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.X", "CD4.Y") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.XY vs CD4.RSTUHI in gut"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y") & organ_simplified %in% c("colon LP", "small intestine LP")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.HI vs CD4.RSTUXY in gut"),

#5    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.RS vs CD4.TUXYHI in SLO"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.T", "CD4.U") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.TU vs CD4.RSXYHI in SLO"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.X", "CD4.Y") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.XY vs CD4.RSTUHI in SLO"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.H", "CD4.I") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y") & organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.HI vs CD4.RSTUXY in SLO"),

#6   
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I") ) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.G vs CD4.RSTUXYHI"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S", "CD4.T", "CD4.U", "CD4.X", "CD4.Y", "CD4.H", "CD4.I")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.Q vs CD4.RSTUXYHI"),

    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q")) %>% pull(cellID), 
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4") & annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.R", "CD4.S")) %>% pull(cellID),  
         title = "CD4.Q vs CD4.RS")
    
)

results_list = list()

for (i in 1:length(group_list)) {
    print(group_list[[i]]$title)
    results_list[[group_list[[i]]$title]] = FlashierDGE(F1, L1, group_list[[i]]$group1, group_list[[i]]$group2, title_plot = group_list[[i]]$title)
}

results_list[["CD4.RS vs CD4.TUXY"]]

```

GP in tips
```{r}

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_tips1.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[1]]$p1
results_list[[2]]$p1
results_list[[3]]$p1
results_list[[4]]$p1
dev.off()

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_tips2.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[5]]$p1
results_list[[6]]$p1
results_list[[7]]$p1
dev.off()

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_tips3.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[8]]$p1
results_list[[9]]$p1
results_list[[10]]$p1
dev.off()

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_tipsGut.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[11]]$p1
results_list[[12]]$p1
results_list[[13]]$p1
results_list[[14]]$p1
dev.off()

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_tipsSLO.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[15]]$p1
results_list[[16]]$p1
results_list[[17]]$p1
results_list[[18]]$p1
dev.off()

pdf(sprintf("%s/FlashierDGE_volcano_GP_Midland.pdf", out_dir), 15,15, useDingbats = F)
results_list[[19]]$p1
results_list[[20]]$p1
results_list[[21]]$p1
dev.off()

results_list[[11]]$diff_genes["Tbx21",]
results_list[[12]]$diff_genes["Gata3",]
results_list[[13]]$diff_genes["Rorc",]
results_list[[14]]$diff_genes["Bcl6",]

results_list[[11]]$diff_genes["Ifng",]
results_list[[12]]$diff_genes["Il5",]
results_list[[13]]$diff_genes["Il17a",]
results_list[[14]]$diff_genes["Il21",]
```

```{r}

tt = results_list[5:7]

results_list[[1]]$diff_genes["Tbx21",]
results_list[[2]]$diff_genes["Gata3",]
results_list[[3]]$diff_genes["Rorc",]
results_list[[4]]$diff_genes["Bcl6",]

results_list[[5]]$diff_genes["Tbx21",]
results_list[[6]]$diff_genes["Gata3",]
results_list[[7]]$diff_genes["Rorc",]

results_list[[5]]$p1
results_list[[6]]$p1
results_list[[7]]$p1

results_list[[8]]$p1
results_list[[9]]$p1
results_list[[10]]$p1

plot(results_list[[8]]$diff_genes$log2FC, results_list[[9]]$diff_genes$log2FC)

comp_filt = names(tt)
# comp_filt = comp_filt[grepl("_vs_others", comp_filt)]

# #filter gene names
# genes_to_label <- c()
# for (i in comp_filt) {
#   new_genes <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes %>%
#     arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
#     # filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
#     pull(SYMBOL)
#   new_genes <- setdiff(new_genes, genes_to_label)
#   genes_to_label <- c(genes_to_label, head(new_genes, 20))
# }

genes_to_label <- c()
for (i in comp_filt) {
  df <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes #%>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)
  # top up
  up_genes <- df %>% filter(log2FC > 0.249) %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # top down
  # down_genes <- df %>%
  #   arrange(log2FC) %>%
  #   pull(SYMBOL)
  # remove genes already selected
  up_genes <- setdiff(up_genes, genes_to_label)
  # down_genes <- setdiff(down_genes, genes_to_label)

  # add top 20 each
  genes_to_label <- c(
    genes_to_label,
    head(up_genes, 100)#, head(down_genes, 10)
  )
}

genes_to_label <- genes_to_label[
  !grepl(
    "^Gm|^mt-|^Rpl|^Rps|^Snor|^Mir|^Linc|^Rp[sl]|-ps|Rik$|^Hbb",
    genes_to_label,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
]

#plot heatmap
# mat_coef <- sapply(tt, function(tt) tt$logFC)
mat_coef <- Reduce(cbind, lapply(tt, function(x) x$diff_genes$log2FC))
rownames(mat_coef) <- tt[[1]]$diff_genes$SYMBOL
colnames(mat_coef) = make.names(names(tt))
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
range(mat_plot)

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-3, 0, 3),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)

# pdf(sprintf("%s/heatmap_memory_vs_acute_SLO_LCMV.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
# pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_LCMV_SLO_memory_vs_acute_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir2), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in LCMV SLO"
)
# dev.off()

# Access the plots and data
results$p1  # First plot (MA plot of factors)
results$p2  # Second plot (MA plot of genes)
results$diff_factors  # table for fold changes of gene programs
results$diff_genes %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) # table for fold changes of genes


```




**Figure 5 - memory **
--> see CD4_TRBI.Rmd for external datasets

Use new smarta definition!!!
```{r}
smarta_citeseq = read.table(sprintf("%s/smarta_citeseq_igt363840_2026.csv","/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/IGT363840_SmartaP14"), header = F)[,1]
so$smarta_2026 =  colnames(so) %in% smarta_citeseq
so@meta.data %>% count(Ag_spe, IGT)
so$Ag_spe[so$Ag_spe == "SMARTA"] = NA
so$Ag_spe[colnames(so) %in% smarta_citeseq] = "SMARTA"

so$infection_phase2 = NA
so$infection_phase2[so$IGT == "IGT43" & so$timepoint %in% c("6 dpi", "10 dpi")] = "acute"
so$infection_phase2[so$IGT == "IGT43" & so$timepoint %in% c("25 dpi", "30 dpi", "60 dpi")] = "cleared"
so$infection_phase2[so$IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40")] = so$infection_phase[so$IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40")]

so$organ_simplified2 = NA
so$organ_simplified2[so$organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")] = "SLO"
so$organ_simplified2[!so$organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")] = "NLT"

```

Plot MDE immgenT in LCMV arm and Listeria
```{r}
sub = so@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent %in% c("ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W", "LCMV Armstrong"), organ_simplified %in% c("SLO", "LN", "spleen"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% count(sample_code, sample_type, organ_simplified)
tmp = so[,so@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent %in% c("ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W", "LCMV Armstrong"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% rownames()] #organ_simplified %in% c("SLO", "LN", "spleen")
tmp$organ_simplified0 = "SLO"

tmp@meta.data %>% count(infection_agent, infection_phase, infection_phase2, timepoint, Ag_spe, organ_simplified2)
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W") %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2)

tmp@meta.data %>% count(infection_agent, timepoint, Ag_spe)

###LCMV SLO
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong", Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2, Ag_spe)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% group_by(timepoint) %>% slice_sample(n = 121) %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID)
sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% pull(cellID)
tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_LCMV_timecourse_IGT363840_SLO.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
# dev.off()

# tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% count(infection_phase)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% group_by(infection_phase)  %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID) #%>% slice_sample(n = 80)
# tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
# pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_LCMV_timecourse_IGT363840.pdf.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$infection_phase2)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase2 == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
dev.off()


###Listeria
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W") %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2)
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% count(infection_phase2, timepoint, organ_simplified2, Ag_spe)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W") %>% group_by(infection_phase2) %>% slice_sample(n = 500)  %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID) 
sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% pull(cellID) #%>% slice_sample(n = 500) 
tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_Listeria_timecourse_IGT43_SLO.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames()]
    nrow(tmp3)
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}

#To check that the AddEmbeddingRasterBackground was working well
# for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
#     print(i)
#     p = MyDimPlotHighlight(seurat_object = so, umap_to_plot = "mde_incremental", cells_to_highlight = tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames(), highlight_column_name = "annotation_level2", pixels = c(512, 512), mycols = mypal_level2, title = "", highlight_size = 1, highlight_alpha = 1, print_plot1 = T, print_plot2 = F, labelclusters = F)
#     print(p)
# }

for (i in na.omit(unique(tmp2$infection_phase2))) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase2 == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
dev.off()

###LCMV NLT
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong", Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT") %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2, Ag_spe, organ_simplified2,organ_simplified)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% group_by(timepoint) %>% slice_sample(n = 121) %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID)
sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT") %>% pull(cellID)
tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_LCMV_timecourse_IGT363840_NLT.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
# dev.off()

# tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% count(infection_phase)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% group_by(infection_phase)  %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID) #%>% slice_sample(n = 80)
# tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
for (i in unique(tmp2$infection_phase2)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase2 == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
dev.off()

###LCMV SILP_SMG_prostate
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong", Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT", organ_simplified %in% c("small intestine LP", "submandibular gland", "prostate")) %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2, Ag_spe, organ_simplified2,organ_simplified)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% group_by(timepoint) %>% slice_sample(n = 121) %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID)
sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT", organ_simplified %in% c("small intestine LP", "submandibular gland", "prostate")) %>% pull(cellID)
tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_LCMV_timecourse_IGT363840_NLT_SILP_SMG_prostate.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
# dev.off()

# tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% count(infection_phase)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% group_by(infection_phase)  %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID) #%>% slice_sample(n = 80)
# tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
for (i in unique(tmp2$infection_phase2)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase2 == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
dev.off()

###LCMV Lung bone marrow
tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong", Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT", organ_simplified %in% c("lung", "bone marrow")) %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2, Ag_spe, organ_simplified2,organ_simplified)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% group_by(timepoint) %>% slice_sample(n = 121) %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID)
sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "NLT", organ_simplified %in% c("lung", "bone marrow")) %>% pull(cellID)
tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
pdf(sprintf("%s/MDE_LCMV_timecourse_IGT363840_NLT_SILP_lung_bonemarrow.pdf",out_dir),7, 7, useDingbats = F)
for (i in unique(tmp2$timepoint)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(timepoint == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
# dev.off()

# tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA") %>% count(infection_phase)
# sub = tmp@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "LCMV Armstrong" & Ag_spe == "SMARTA", organ_simplified2 == "SLO") %>% group_by(infection_phase)  %>% ungroup() %>% pull(cellID) #%>% slice_sample(n = 80)
# tmp2 = tmp[,sub]
for (i in unique(tmp2$infection_phase2)) {
    print(i)
    tmp3 = tmp2[,tmp2@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase2 == i) %>% rownames()]
    
    p = DimPlot(tmp3, reduction = "mde_incremental", group.by = "annotation_level2", cols = mypal_level2, pt.size = 2) + ggtitle(sprintf("%s, %s cells",i, ncol(tmp3)))
    bg = AddEmbeddingRasterBackground(lineage = "CD4")
    p$layers = c(list(bg), p$layers)
    p = p + ggplot2::coord_fixed() + xlim(c(-2.5,4)) + ylim(c(-2.5,2.5)) +theme_void() + NoLegend()
    print(p)
}
dev.off()

```

Cluster proportion LCMV and Listeria acute vs memory
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

cluster_col <- "annotation_level2"   # change if needed

# so@meta.data %>% filter(IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% count(organ_simplified)
# so$organ_simplified2 = NA
# so$organ_simplified2[so$organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")] = "SLO"
# so$organ_simplified2[!so$organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")] = "NLT"

#checks
so@meta.data %>% filter(IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), infection_phase2 %in% c("acute", "cleared"), infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong", "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W")) %>% count(infection_phase, infection_phase2, IGT, Ag_spe)
so@meta.data %>% filter(IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), infection_phase2 %in% c("acute", "cleared"), infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong", "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W")) %>% count(IGT, organ_simplified, organ_simplified2)

so@meta.data %>% count(infection_agent, infection_phase, infection_phase, timepoint, Ag_spe, organ)
so@meta.data %>% filter(infection_agent == "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W") %>% count(timepoint, infection_phase2)

#Make prop table
so@meta.data %>% filter(infection_phase %in% c("acute", "cleared"),infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong", "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp", "SMARTA")) %>% count(sample_code, infection_agent, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2, Ag_spe)

clusters <- levels(so$annotation_level2)[grepl("^CD4", levels(so$annotation_level2))]

df_plot <- so@meta.data %>%
  filter(
    infection_phase2 %in% c("acute", "cleared"),
    infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong", "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W"),
    Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp", "SMARTA"),
  ) %>%
  count(
    infection_agent, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2, timepoint, #sample_code
    .data[[cluster_col]],
    name = "n"
  ) %>%
  rename(cluster = all_of(cluster_col)) %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels = levels(so$annotation_level2))) %>%
  group_by(infection_agent, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2, timepoint) %>% #sample_code
  complete(cluster = clusters, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_total = sum(n),
    pct = 100 * n / sample_total
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

df_plot2 <- df_plot %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_phase = paste(cluster, infection_phase2)
  )

x_levels <- as.vector(rbind(
  paste(clusters, "acute"),
  paste(clusters, "cleared")
))

df_plot2$cluster_phase <- factor(df_plot2$cluster_phase, levels = x_levels)

#make 
# df_plot <- so@meta.data %>%
#   filter(infection_phase2 %in% c("acute", "cleared"), infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong", "ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp", "SMARTA")) %>%
#   count(sample_code, infection_agent, infection_phase2,organ_simplified2, timepoint, .data[[cluster_col]], name = "n") %>%
#   group_by(sample_code, infection_agent, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2) %>%
#     complete(cluster = clusters, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
#   mutate(
#     sample_total = sum(n),
#     pct = 100 * n / sample_total
#   ) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   rename(cluster = all_of(cluster_col))
# df_plot$cluster = factor(df_plot$cluster, levels = levels(so$annotation_level2))
# 
# df_plot2 <- df_plot %>%
#   filter(infection_phase2 %in% c("acute","cleared")) %>%
#   mutate(
#     cluster_phase = paste(cluster, infection_phase2)
#   )
# clusters <- levels(so$annotation_level2)[grepl("^CD4", levels(so$annotation_level2))]
# x_levels <- as.vector(
#   rbind(
#     paste(clusters, "acute"),
#     paste(clusters, "cleared")
#   )
# )
# df_plot2$cluster_phase <- factor(df_plot2$cluster_phase, levels = x_levels)

# LCMV SLO
df_plot3 = df_plot2 %>% filter(!(cluster %in% c("CD4.wM", "CD4.wN", "CD4.wZ")), infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong"), organ_simplified2 %in% "SLO")
df_plot3$cluster = factor(df_plot3$cluster, levels = levels(so$annotation_level2))
# df_plot3 = df_plot3 %>% filter(sample_total > 10)

# df_plot3 %>% select(sample_code, infection_phase2) %>% unique() %>% count(sample_code, infection_phase2)

p3 = ggplot(df_plot3, aes(cluster, pct, color = infection_phase2, shape = timepoint)) +
    geom_jitter(
        position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.1,
            dodge.width = 0.6
        ),
        size = 3
    ) +
    stat_summary(
        aes(group = infection_phase2),
        fun = mean,
        geom = "crossbar",
        width = 0.5,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
        color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("acute" = "blue", "cleared" = "red")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Cluster",
        y = "% cells"
    )
p3

pdf(sprintf("%s/ClusterProp_LCMV_acute_memory_SLO_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir), 8,5, useDingbats = F)
p3 + NoGrid()
dev.off()

# Listeria SLO
df_plot3 = df_plot2 %>% filter(!(cluster %in% c("CD4.wM", "CD4.wN", "CD4.wZ")), infection_agent %in% c("ActA-deficient Listeria monocytogenes (DPL1942)-2W"), organ_simplified2 %in% "SLO")
df_plot3$cluster = factor(df_plot3$cluster, levels = levels(so$annotation_level2))
# df_plot3 = df_plot3 %>% filter(sample_total > 10)

# df_plot3 %>% select(sample_code, infection_phase2) %>% unique() %>% count(sample_code, infection_phase2)

p3 = ggplot(df_plot3, aes(cluster, pct, color = infection_phase2)) +
    geom_jitter(
        position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.1,
            dodge.width = 0.6
        ),
        size = 3
    ) +
    stat_summary(
        aes(group = infection_phase2),
        fun = mean,
        geom = "crossbar",
        width = 0.5,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
        color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("acute" = "blue", "cleared" = "red")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Cluster",
        y = "% cells"
    )
p3

pdf(sprintf("%s/ClusterProp_Listeria_acute_memory_SLO_IGT43.pdf", out_dir), 8,5, useDingbats = F)
p3 + NoGrid()
dev.off()

# LCMV NLT
df_plot3 = df_plot2 %>% filter(!(cluster %in% c("CD4.wM", "CD4.wN", "CD4.wZ")), infection_agent %in% c("LCMV Armstrong"), organ_simplified2 %in% "NLT")
df_plot3$cluster = factor(df_plot3$cluster, levels = levels(so$annotation_level2))
df_plot3 = df_plot3 %>% filter(sample_total > 10)

# df_plot3 %>% select(sample_code, infection_phase2) %>% unique() %>% count(sample_code, infection_phase2)

p3 = ggplot(df_plot3, aes(cluster, pct, color = infection_phase2, shape = timepoint)) +
    geom_jitter(
        position = position_jitterdodge(
             jitter.width = 0.1,
            dodge.width = 0.6
        ),
        size = 3
    ) +
    stat_summary(
        aes(group = infection_phase2),
        fun = mean,
        geom = "crossbar",
        width = 0.5,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
        color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("acute" = "blue", "cleared" = "red")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Cluster",
        y = "% cells"
    )
p3

pdf(sprintf("%s/ClusterProp_LCMV_acute_memory_NLT_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir), 8,5, useDingbats = F)
p3 + NoGrid()
dev.off()

```

TopicDGE LCMV
```{r}
mdata_orig = so@meta.data

L1 = readRDS(sprintf('/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/L1.Rds')) #cells x factor
F1 = readRDS(sprintf("/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/F1.Rds")) #gene x factor

mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA", "2WTetp"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"),infection_phase2 %in% c("acute", "cleared") ) %>% count(infection_agent, timepoint, infection_phase2, organ_simplified2, Ag_spe )
mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% count(Ag_spe)

group_list = list(
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 memory vs acute in LCMV"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G"))  %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G") )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "CD4.G memory vs acute in LCMV"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared", annotation_level2 == "CD4.H" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute", annotation_level2 == "CD4.H" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "CD4.H memory vs acute in LCMV")
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G", "CD4.H"))  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G", "CD4.H") )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4.GH memory vs acute in LCMV"),
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q", "CD4.R", "CD4.S"))  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q", "CD4.R", "CD4.S") )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4.QRS memory vs acute in LCMV")
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q"))  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified2 %in% c("SLO"), infection_phase == "acute", annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q") )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4.Q memory vs acute in LCMV")

    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.A","CD4.B", "CD4.C"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.A","CD4.B", "CD4.C"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 ABC memory vs acute in LCMV"),
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.H", "CD4.I"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.H", "CD4.I"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 GHI memory vs acute in LCMV"),
    # 
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q","CD4.R", "CD4.S"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q","CD4.R", "CD4.S"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 QRS memory vs acute in LCMV")

)

results_list = list()

for (i in 1:length(group_list)) {
    print(group_list[[i]]$title)
    results_list[[group_list[[i]]$title]] = FlashierDGE(F1, L1, group_list[[i]]$group1, group_list[[i]]$group2, title_plot = group_list[[i]]$title)
}


# results$p1  # First plot (MA plot of factors)
# results$p2  # Second plot (MA plot of genes)
# results$diff_factors  %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>% head(10)
# results$diff_genes %>% arrange(desc(log2FC))  %>% head(50)# table for fold changes of genes

results_list_LCMV = results_list

#Heatmap with the results
tt = results_list 

comp_filt = names(tt)
# comp_filt = comp_filt[grepl("_vs_others", comp_filt)]

# #filter gene names
# genes_to_label <- c()
# for (i in comp_filt) {
#   new_genes <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes %>%
#     arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
#     # filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
#     pull(SYMBOL)
#   new_genes <- setdiff(new_genes, genes_to_label)
#   genes_to_label <- c(genes_to_label, head(new_genes, 20))
# }

genes_to_label <- c()
for (i in comp_filt) {
  df <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes #%>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)
  # top up
  up_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # top down
  down_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(log2FC) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # remove genes already selected
  # up_genes <- setdiff(up_genes, genes_to_label)
  # down_genes <- setdiff(down_genes, genes_to_label)

  # add top 20 each
  genes_to_label <- c(
    genes_to_label,
    head(up_genes, 20),
    head(down_genes, 20)
  )
}

genes_to_label <- genes_to_label[
  !grepl(
    "^Gm|^mt-|^Rpl|^Rps|^Snor|^Mir|^Linc|^Rp[sl]|-ps|Rik$|^Hbb",
    genes_to_label,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
] %>% unique()

genes_to_label_LCMV = genes_to_label

#plot heatmap
# mat_coef <- sapply(tt, function(tt) tt$logFC)
mat_coef <- Reduce(cbind, lapply(tt, function(x) x$diff_genes$log2FC))
rownames(mat_coef) <- tt[[1]]$diff_genes$SYMBOL
colnames(mat_coef) = make.names(names(tt))
mat_coef_LCMV = mat_coef
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
range(mat_plot)

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-1, 0, 1),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)

# pdf(sprintf("%s/heatmap_memory_vs_acute_SLO_LCMV.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_LCMV_SLO_memory_vs_acute_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in LCMV SLO"
)
dev.off()




```

TopicDGE Listeria
```{r}
# mdata_orig = so@meta.data
# L1 = readRDS(sprintf('/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/L1.Rds')) #cells x factor
# F1 = readRDS(sprintf("/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/F1.Rds")) #gene x factor

mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO") ) %>% count(infection_phase, annotation_level2)
mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% count(Ag_spe)

group_list = list(
    
        # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
        #  group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
        #  title = "CD4 memory vs acute in Listeria"),

    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.A","CD4.B", "CD4.C"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.A","CD4.B", "CD4.C"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 ABC memory vs acute in Listeria"),
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.H", "CD4.I"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.H", "CD4.I"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 GHI memory vs acute in Listeria"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "CD4 G memory vs acute in Listeria"),
    
        list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.H"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.H"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "CD4 H memory vs acute in Listeria"),
    
         #    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.I"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         # group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.I"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         # title = "CD4 I memory vs acute in Listeria"),
    
                list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "CD4 Q memory vs acute in Listeria")
    
    # list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q","CD4.R", "CD4.S"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("2WTetp"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q","CD4.R", "CD4.S"), infection_phase == "acute" )  %>% pull(cellID),
    #      title = "CD4 QRS memory vs acute in Listeria")
)

results_list = list()

for (i in 1:length(group_list)) {
    print(group_list[[i]]$title)
    results_list[[group_list[[i]]$title]] = FlashierDGE(F1, L1, group_list[[i]]$group1, group_list[[i]]$group2, title_plot = group_list[[i]]$title)
}


# results$p1  # First plot (MA plot of factors)
# results$p2  # Second plot (MA plot of genes)
# results$diff_factors  %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>% head(10)
# results$diff_genes %>% arrange(desc(log2FC))  %>% head(50)# table for fold changes of genes

results_list_Lm = results_list

#Heatmap with the results
tt = results_list 

comp_filt = names(tt)
# comp_filt = comp_filt[grepl("_vs_others", comp_filt)]

#filter gene names
# genes_to_label <- c()
# for (i in comp_filt) {
#   new_genes <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes %>%
#     arrange(desc(abs(log2FC))) %>%
#     # filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
#     pull(SYMBOL)
#   new_genes <- setdiff(new_genes, genes_to_label)
#   genes_to_label <- c(genes_to_label, head(new_genes, 20))
# }

genes_to_label <- c()
for (i in comp_filt) {
  df <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes #%>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)
  # top up
  up_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # top down
  down_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(log2FC) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # remove genes already selected
  # up_genes <- setdiff(up_genes, genes_to_label)
  # down_genes <- setdiff(down_genes, genes_to_label)

  # add top 20 each
  genes_to_label <- c(
    genes_to_label,
    head(up_genes, 20),
    head(down_genes, 20)
  )
}

genes_to_label <- genes_to_label[
  !grepl(
    "^Gm|^mt-|^Rpl|^Rps|^Snor|^Mir|^Linc|^Rp[sl]|-ps|Rik$|^Hbb",
    genes_to_label,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
] %>% unique()

genes_to_label_Lm = genes_to_label

#plot heatmap
# mat_coef <- sapply(tt, function(tt) tt$logFC)
mat_coef <- Reduce(cbind, lapply(tt, function(x) x$diff_genes$log2FC))
rownames(mat_coef) <- tt[[1]]$diff_genes$SYMBOL
colnames(mat_coef) = make.names(names(tt))
mat_coef_Lm = mat_coef
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
range(mat_plot)

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)

# pdf(sprintf("%s/heatmap_memory_vs_acute_SLO_LCMV.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_Listeria_SLO_memory_vs_acute_IGT363840_2.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 7, useDingbats = F)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in Listeria SLO"
)
 dev.off()

```

Heatmap with LCMV and Listeria together
```{r}
tt = c(results_list_Lm, results_list_LCMV)
genes_to_label = setdiff(unique(genes_to_label_LCMV, genes_to_label_Lm), c("Cd8b1", "CT010467.1"))
intersect(genes_to_label_LCMV, genes_to_label_Lm)

all(rownames(mat_coef_LCMV) == rownames(mat_coef_Lm))
mat_coef =  cbind(mat_coef_LCMV, mat_coef_Lm)
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
mat_plot_LCMV = mat_coef_LCMV[genes_to_label, ]
mat_plot_Lm = mat_coef_Lm[genes_to_label, ]

range(mat_plot)

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_ListeriaLCMV_SLO_memory_vs_acute_IGT36384043_2.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-1, 0, 1),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot_LCMV,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in Listeria SLO"
)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-1, 0, 1),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot_Lm,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in Listeria SLO"
)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-0.75, 0, 0.75),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)
Heatmap(
  cbind(mat_plot_Lm, mat_plot_LCMV),
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = T,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "memory vs acute across clusters in Listeria + LCMV"
)
dev.off()

```

TopicDGE LCMV NLT vs SLO
```{r}
mdata_orig = so@meta.data

L1 = readRDS(sprintf('/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/L1.Rds')) #cells x factor
F1 = readRDS(sprintf("/Users/david/google_drive_uchicago/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/topic/flashier20250215_alldata_backfit/F1.Rds")) #gene x factor

mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO") ) %>% count(infection_phase, organ_simplified)
mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), !(organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")) ) %>% count(infection_phase, organ_simplified)
mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43")) %>% count(Ag_spe)

group_list = list(
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "cleared" ) %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), !(organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G","CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "SLO vs NLT in GQ, in LCMV at memory timepoint"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G"), infection_phase == "cleared" ) %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), !(organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.G"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "SLO vs NLT in G, in LCMV at memory timepoint"),
    
    list(group1 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO"), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "cleared" ) %>% pull(cellID),
         group2 = mdata_orig %>% filter(annotation_level1 %in% c("CD4"), IGT %in% c("IGT36", "IGT38", "IGT40", "IGT43"), Ag_spe %in% c("SMARTA"), !(organ_simplified %in% c("spleen", "LN", "SLO")), annotation_level2 %in% c("CD4.Q"), infection_phase == "cleared" )  %>% pull(cellID),
         title = "SLO vs NLT in Q, in LCMV at memory timepoint")
    
)

results_list = list()

for (i in 1:length(group_list)) {
    print(group_list[[i]]$title)
    results_list[[group_list[[i]]$title]] = FlashierDGE(F1, L1, group_list[[i]]$group1, group_list[[i]]$group2, title_plot = group_list[[i]]$title)
}

# results = results_list[[3]]
# results$p1  # First plot (MA plot of factors)
# results$p2  # Second plot (MA plot of genes)
# results$diff_factors  %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>% head(10)
# results$diff_genes %>% arrange(desc(log2FC))  %>% head(50)# table for fold changes of genes

pdf(sprintf("%s/Volcano_LCMV_SLO_vs_NLT_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir2), width = 5, 5, useDingbats = F)
results = results_list[["SLO vs NLT in GQ, in LCMV at memory timepoint"]]
results$p1  # First plot (MA plot of factors)
results$p2  # Second plot (MA plot of genes)
# results$diff_factors  %>% arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>% head(10)
# results$diff_genes %>% arrange(desc(log2FC))  %>% head(50)# table for fold changes of genes
dev.off()

#Heatmap with the results
tt = results_list 

comp_filt = names(tt)
# comp_filt = comp_filt[grepl("_vs_others", comp_filt)]

# #filter gene names
# genes_to_label <- c()
# for (i in comp_filt) {
#   new_genes <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes %>%
#     arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
#     # filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05) %>%
#     pull(SYMBOL)
#   new_genes <- setdiff(new_genes, genes_to_label)
#   genes_to_label <- c(genes_to_label, head(new_genes, 20))
# }

genes_to_label <- c()
for (i in comp_filt) {
  df <- tt[[i]]$diff_genes #%>% filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05)
  # top up
  up_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(desc(log2FC)) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # top down
  down_genes <- df %>%
    arrange(log2FC) %>%
    pull(SYMBOL)
  # remove genes already selected
  up_genes <- setdiff(up_genes, genes_to_label)
  down_genes <- setdiff(down_genes, genes_to_label)

  # add top 20 each
  genes_to_label <- c(
    genes_to_label,
    head(up_genes, 10),
    head(down_genes, 10)
  )
}

genes_to_label <- genes_to_label[
  !grepl(
    "^Gm|^mt-|^Rpl|^Rps|^Snor|^Mir|^Linc|^Rp[sl]|-ps|Rik$|^Hbb",
    genes_to_label,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
]


#plot heatmap
# mat_coef <- sapply(tt, function(tt) tt$logFC)
mat_coef <- Reduce(cbind, lapply(tt, function(x) x$diff_genes$log2FC))
rownames(mat_coef) <- tt[[1]]$diff_genes$SYMBOL
colnames(mat_coef) = make.names(names(tt))
mat_coef_LCMV = mat_coef
mat_plot = mat_coef[genes_to_label, ]
range(mat_plot)

library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-1, 0, 1),
  c("#4575B4", "white", "#D73027")
)

# pdf(sprintf("%s/heatmap_memory_vs_acute_SLO_LCMV.pdf", out_dir), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
pdf(sprintf("%s/Heatmap_LCMV_SLO_vs_NLT_IGT363840.pdf", out_dir2), width = 3, 8, useDingbats = F)
Heatmap(
  mat_plot,
  name = "log2FC",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = T,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
  column_title = "SLO vs NLT in GQ, in LCMV"
)
dev.off()


```


**Figure 6: resting vs activated**

```{r}
ttlist = readRDS('/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/20260206_freeze/CD4/DGE_limma/20260206/ttlist_Level2Group.Rds')

names(ttlist)
tmp = ttlist

i = "Activated_vs_Resting"

# gene_sig = list()

pdf(sprintf("%s/volcanos_Resting_vs_Activated_noLabels.pdf", out_dir), 10, 10, useDingbats = F)
pdf(sprintf("%s/volcanos_Resting_vs_Activated_Labels.pdf", out_dir), 25, 25, useDingbats = F)

# for (i in names(ttlist)) {
    print(i)
    vplot = na.omit(data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^(-tmp[[i]]$logFC), pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value + 10^-150, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))) #dealing with NA
    # vplot = data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^tmp[[i]]$logFC, pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value+10^-300, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))
    p = Vplot(vplot = vplot, xlab = names(tmp)[i], xlimits = c(min(vplot$fc[vplot$fc != 0]), max(vplot$fc)), ylimits = c(min(vplot$pval), 1), color = "black")  #c(min(vplot$pval[vplot$pval != 0]),1)
    sub = vplot %>%
        filter(abs(log2(fc)) > 1 & pval < 10^-100) %>%
        arrange(desc(log2(fc))) %>%
        pull(SYMBOL)
    sub
    gene_sig[[sprintf("%s_up", i)]] = sub
    highlight_genes = sub #unique(c(head(sub, 25), tail(sub, 25)))
    # sub = (log2(vplot$fc) > 0.5 | log2(vplot$fc) < -0.5)  & vplot$pval < 0.05
    # sub = vplot[sub,] %>% arrange(desc(log2(fc)))
    # sub1 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(25) #vplot$SYMBOL %in% as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:200]
    # sub2 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(25)
    highlight_filter = vplot$SYMBOL %in% highlight_genes
    # sub = vplot$SYMBOL %in% c(sub1, sub2)#as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:50]
    library(ggrepel)
    print(p)
    # print(p + geom_text_repel(data = vplot[highlight_filter,], aes(x = fc, y = pval, label = SYMBOL)) + ggtitle(i) + xlab(sprintf("FC %s", i)))
# }
dev.off()
```

```{r}
ttlist = readRDS('/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/20260206_freeze/CD4/DGE_limma/20260206/ttlist_in_Resting.Rds')

tmp = ttlist
for (i in names(ttlist)) {
    print(i)
    vplot = na.omit(data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^(tmp[[i]]$logFC), pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value + 10^-100, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))) #dealing with NA
    # vplot = data.frame(SYMBOL = tmp[[i]]$SYMBOL, fc = 2^tmp[[i]]$logFC, pval = tmp[[i]]$P.Value+10^-300, AveExpr = 2^(tmp[[i]]$AveExpr))
    p = Vplot(vplot = vplot, xlab = names(tmp)[i], xlimits = c(min(vplot$fc[vplot$fc != 0]), max(vplot$fc)), ylimits = c(min(vplot$pval), 1), color = "black")  #c(min(vplot$pval[vplot$pval != 0]),1)
    sub = vplot %>%
        filter(abs(log2(fc)) > 0.5 & pval < 10^-10) %>%
        arrange(desc(log2(fc))) %>%
        pull(SYMBOL)
    sub
    gene_sig[[sprintf("%s_up", i)]] = sub
    highlight_genes = sub #unique(c(head(sub, 25), tail(sub, 25)))
    # sub = (log2(vplot$fc) > 0.5 | log2(vplot$fc) < -0.5)  & vplot$pval < 0.05
    # sub = vplot[sub,] %>% arrange(desc(log2(fc)))
    # sub1 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% head(25) #vplot$SYMBOL %in% as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:200]
    # sub2 = sub %>% pull(SYMBOL) %>% tail(25)
    highlight_filter = vplot$SYMBOL %in% highlight_genes
    # sub = vplot$SYMBOL %in% c(sub1, sub2)#as.character(sub2$SYMBOL)[1:50]
    library(ggrepel)
    # print(p)
    print(p + geom_text_repel(data = vplot[highlight_filter,], aes(x = fc, y = pval, label = SYMBOL)) + ggtitle(i) + xlab(sprintf("FC %s", i)))
}
```


**Figure 7 flow analysis**

organ comparison in healthy 
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(condition_detailed == "healthy") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(flow_long$cluster, levels = c("CD4.A","CD4.G","CD4.H","CD4.I","CD4.Q","CD4.RS","CD4.TU","CD4.XY"))
flow_long$organ_simplified = factor(flow_long$organ_simplified, levels = c("spleen", "lung", "colon"))

# mean per cluster and organ
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, organ_simplified) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# ANOVA p-value per cluster
anova_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = summary(aov(prop ~ organ_simplified))[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1],
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = organ_simplified)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.65),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = organ_simplified),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = organ_simplified),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = anova_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
    ggtitle("Healthy organ comparison") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
    color = "Organ"
  ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("spleen" = "blue", "lung" = "darkgreen", "colon" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(anova_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_organ_comparison_healthy.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()


```

colon healthy vs scurfy
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(organ_simplified == "colon", condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "scurfy")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(
  flow_long$cluster,
  levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU", "CD4.XY")
)

flow_long$condition_detailed <- factor(
  flow_long$condition_detailed,
  levels = c("healthy", "scurfy")
)

# mean per cluster and condition
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, condition_detailed) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# p-value per cluster
test_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = t.test(prop ~ condition_detailed)$p.value,
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = condition_detailed)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = test_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
        ggtitle("Healthy vs scurfy in colon") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("healthy" = "black", "scurfy" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(test_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_scurfy_vs_healthy_colon.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

spleen healthy vs scurfy
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(organ_simplified == "spleen", condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "scurfy")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(
  flow_long$cluster,
  levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU", "CD4.XY")
)

flow_long$condition_detailed <- factor(
  flow_long$condition_detailed,
  levels = c("healthy", "scurfy")
)

# mean per cluster and condition
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, condition_detailed) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# p-value per cluster
test_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = t.test(prop ~ condition_detailed)$p.value,
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = condition_detailed)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = test_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
            ggtitle("Healthy vs scurfy in spleen") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("healthy" = "black", "scurfy" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(test_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_scurfy_vs_healthy_spleen.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

Lung healthy vs scurfy
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(organ_simplified == "lung", condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "scurfy")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(
  flow_long$cluster,
  levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU", "CD4.XY")
)

flow_long$condition_detailed <- factor(
  flow_long$condition_detailed,
  levels = c("healthy", "scurfy")
)

# mean per cluster and condition
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, condition_detailed) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# p-value per cluster
test_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = t.test(prop ~ condition_detailed)$p.value,
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = condition_detailed)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = test_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
            ggtitle("Healthy vs scurfy in lung") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("healthy" = "black", "scurfy" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(test_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_scurfy_vs_healthy_lung.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

spleen healthy vs LCMV
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(organ_simplified == "spleen", condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "LCMV")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(
  flow_long$cluster,
  levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU", "CD4.XY")
)

flow_long$condition_detailed <- factor(
  flow_long$condition_detailed,
  levels = c("healthy", "LCMV")
)

# mean per cluster and condition
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, condition_detailed) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# p-value per cluster
test_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = t.test(prop ~ condition_detailed)$p.value,
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = condition_detailed)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = test_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
            ggtitle("Healthy vs LCMV in spleen") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
```
