```{r}
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("healthy" = "black", "LCMV" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(test_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_LCMV_vs_healthy_spleen.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

lung healthy vs LCMV
```{r}
flow_data = read.table(file = '/Users/david/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-zemmour@uchicago.edu/My Drive/ImmgenT/analysis/data_integration/IGT1_96/CD4/misc_plots/flow_prop_sample_clusterpertconv.csv', header = T, sep = ",")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(organ_simplified == "lung", condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "LCMV")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  )

flow_long$cluster <- factor(
  flow_long$cluster,
  levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU", "CD4.XY")
)

flow_long$condition_detailed <- factor(
  flow_long$condition_detailed,
  levels = c("healthy", "LCMV")
)

# mean per cluster and condition
mean_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, condition_detailed) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop), .groups = "drop")

# p-value per cluster
test_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = t.test(prop ~ condition_detailed)$p.value,
    y_pos = max(prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.18,
    label = paste0("p=", signif(p_value, 2)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p = ggplot(flow_long, aes(x = cluster, y = prop, color = condition_detailed)) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.12, dodge.width = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    shape = 95,
    size = 8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = mean_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = mean_prop, label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_prop), color = condition_detailed),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
    vjust = -0.7,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = test_df,
    aes(x = cluster, y = y_pos, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
            ggtitle("Healthy vs LCMV in lung") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of CD4 cluster",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("healthy" = "black", "LCMV" = "red")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = max(test_df$y_pos) * 1.05)

p

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_LCMV_vs_healthy_lung.pdf", out_dir), width = 8, height = 5, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()

```

Dotplot with p values
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

flow_long <- flow_data %>%
  filter(
    condition_detailed %in% c("healthy", "scurfy", "LCMV")
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("CD4."),
    names_to = "cluster",
    values_to = "prop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    organ_simplified = factor(organ_simplified, levels = c("spleen", "lung", "colon")),
    condition_detailed = factor(condition_detailed, levels = c("healthy", "scurfy", "LCMV")),
    cluster = factor(cluster, levels = c("CD4.A", "CD4.G", "CD4.H", "CD4.I", "CD4.XY", "CD4.Q", "CD4.RS", "CD4.TU"))
  )

anova_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(cluster, organ_simplified) %>%
  summarise(
    pval = {
      fit <- aov(prop ~ condition_detailed)
      summary(fit)[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1]
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(signif = pval < 0.05)

plot_df <- flow_long %>%
  group_by(organ_simplified, condition_detailed, cluster) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(anova_df, by = c("cluster", "organ_simplified"))

plot_df$organ_simplified = factor(plot_df$organ_simplified, levels = rev(c("spleen", "lung", "colon")))

cluster_cols <- c(
  "CD4.A"  = "#3f5ab5",
  "CD4.G"  = "#8cc63e",
  "CD4.H"  = "#b7d7a8",
  "CD4.I"  = "#ef4444",
  "CD4.XY" = "#ec4899",
  "CD4.Q"  = "#f59e0b",
  "CD4.RS" = "#8e44ad",
  "CD4.TU" = "#ef4444"
)

p = ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = condition_detailed, y = organ_simplified)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(
      size = mean_prop,
      fill = cluster,
      stroke = ifelse(signif, 1.5, 0.3)  # thick border if significant
    ),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ cluster, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_cols, guide = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "Proportion of Tconv",
    range = c(1, 16)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Flow-gated:"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines")
  )

p 

pdf(sprintf("%s/flow_dotplot_all.pdf", out_dir), width = 18, height = 3, useDingbats = F)
print(p)
dev.off()
```
